projetos.descricao: Application for personal finance management, allowing users to track expenses, income, and view financial reports.
projetos.responsabilidades: Full project development, including front-end, back-end, database, and integration with a local server.

projetos.descricao: Radar Praia Grande is a collaborative platform where citizens of Praia Grande can report news, events, and local issues, increasing the visibility of situations that often do not receive coverage from traditional media. Developed as a Final Course Project, receiving a final grade of 10.
projetos.responsabilidades: Development of the logical data model and database tables, back-end for login, registration, profile and profile editing, user session handling, front-end, and technical documentation.

projetos.descricao: Project developed during classes taught by Professor Ricardo Pupo Larguesa in the Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) course. The goal was to develop a system integrated with Google's AI (Gemini) to support students who use the 'SIGA' system, helping with learning and answering questions related to the student's academic information.
Project developed during Alura courses: "creating a REST API with MongoDB and Express" and "handling search, filters, pagination, and errors in an API".
projetos.responsabilidades: The project included creating an API with database connection, table creation, CRUD operations, integration with a local server, error handling in separate files, pagination, and search filters.

projetos.descricao: Tasks developed during the Mobile Devices course in the ADS program.
projetos.responsabilidades: Development of 7 component-based applications using React Native.
